title: Insta Schem
description: plugin depend FastAsyncWorldEdit for rotate schematics 90°
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-djjP1Hnjjk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe># 

**InstaSchem** is a plugin designed for builders who use FAWE and want to place their schematics in the blink of an eye.  
It allows you to load, preview, and place schematics instantly without going through the lengthy commands of WorldEdit.  
Everything is done using simple and configurable tools.

---

## ✨ Features

With InstaSchem, you can:

- 🖱️ Place a schematic instantly with a right-click of the tool  
- 🔗 Link a schematic to an item to use it  
- 🔄 Rotate the schematic in 90° increments using a left-click  
- ⚙️ Use a simple system designed for both beginners and experienced builders  

---

## 🚀 Overview

InstaSchem makes building smoother, faster, and much more enjoyable.  
It's the perfect tool for players who want to:

- Save time  
- Test ideas  
- Lay out large projects in seconds  

---

## 🧾 Commands
`/instaschem help`

`/instaschem info`

`/instaschem give <tool> <schematic/pw> [-flags]`

`/instaschem bind <schematic/pw> [-flags]`

`/instaschem unbind`

`/instaschem list`

`/instaschem reload`

You can also use `/is` instead of `/instaschem` ; 0.4+ `/ischem`

---

## 🎛️ Flags (0.3 BETA and newer)

- `-a` : Ignore air (removes air from the schematic)  
- `-r` : Random rotation (randomly rotates the schematic on placement)  
- `-m <blocks>` : Place only certain blocks  

---

## 🎲 Multi-Schematic (0.4 BETA and newer)
- Added multi-schematic support
  
  `/ischem bind schem1,schem2,schem3 [-flags]`

- Allows selecting multiple schematics  
- A random schematic is chosen each time the item is used  

---

## 📝 Notes

- Make sure FAWE is properly installed for full compatibility  
- Some features may be available only in the latest version
